query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (quizId, question_text, question_text_sw, `order`) VALUES
(60001, 'Which of the following best describes God''s eternal nature?', 'Ni ipi kati ya zifuatazo inayoeleza vyema asili ya milele ya Mungu?', 1),
(60001, 'What does it mean that God is omnipotent?', 'Nini maana ya kwamba Mungu ana nguvu zote?', 2),
(60001, 'How many persons are in the Trinity?', 'Watu wangapi wanao katika Utatu?', 3),
(60001, 'Which attribute of God means He is perfectly just and righteous?', 'Ni sifa ipi ya Mungu inayomaanisha kwamba yeye ni haki na takatifu kabisa?', 4),
(60001, 'Why is understanding God''s nature important for Christians?', 'Kwa nini ni muhimu kuelewa asili ya Mungu kwa Wakristo?', 5),
(60001, 'Which statement best describes God''s omniscience?', 'Ni kauli ipi inayoeleza vyema ujuzi wa Mungu?', 6),
(60001, 'What is the central message of Jesus'' life and ministry?', 'Ni nini ujumbe wa kati wa maisha na huduma ya Yesu?', 7),
(60001, 'What does it mean that Jesus is "God''s Son"?', 'Nini maana ya kwamba Yesu ni "Mwana wa Mungu"?', 8),
(60001, 'What is the significance of Jesus'' resurrection?', 'Nini umuhimu wa ufufuko wa Yesu?', 9),
(60001, 'What does "substitutionary atonement" mean?', 'Nini maana ya "kufanywa kwa ajili yetu"?', 10),
(60001, 'Why is Jesus called "the only way" to salvation?', 'Kwa nini Yesu anaitwa "njia pekee" ya kuokoa?', 11),
(60001, 'What does Jesus'' promise to "come again" mean for Christians?', 'Nini maana ya ahadi ya Yesu kuwa "anakuja tena" kwa Wakristo?', 12),
(60001, 'What is the role of the Holy Spirit in bringing people to faith?', 'Ni nini jukumu la Roho Mtakatifu katika kuleta watu kwa imani?', 13),
(60001, 'What does it mean that the Holy Spirit "indwells" believers?', 'Nini maana ya kwamba Roho Mtakatifu "inaishi ndani" ya waumini?', 14),
(60001, 'What are spiritual gifts?', 'Ni nini karama za kiroho?', 15),
(60001, 'What are the fruits of the Holy Spirit?', 'Ni nini matunda ya Roho Mtakatifu?', 16),
(60001, 'How does the Holy Spirit help us become more like Jesus?', 'Jinsi gani Roho Mtakatifu inasaidia tuwe kama Yesu?', 17),
(60001, 'What is the relationship between the Holy Spirit and the Bible?', 'Ni nini uhusiano kati ya Roho Mtakatifu na Biblia?', 18),
(60001, 'What is the root cause of our need for salvation?', 'Ni nini sababu ya msingi ya haja yetu ya kuokoa?', 19),
(60001, 'Can we earn salvation through good works?', 'Je, tunaweza kumiliki kuokoa kupitia kazi nzuri?', 20),
(60001, 'What does "repentance" mean in the context of salvation?', 'Nini maana ya "kutubu" katika muktadha wa kuokoa?', 21),
(60001, 'What is faith in the context of becoming a Christian?', 'Ni nini imani katika muktadha wa kuwa Mkristo?', 22),
(60001, 'What does justification mean?', 'Nini maana ya kuhesabiwa kuwa haki?', 23),
(60001, 'What is the assurance of salvation?', 'Ni nini hakika ya kuokoa?', 24),
(60001, 'What is the Church?', 'Ni nini Kanisa?', 25),
(60001, 'What does it mean that the Church is the "body of Christ"?', 'Nini maana ya kwamba Kanisa ni "mwili wa Kristo"?', 26),
(60001, 'What is the primary mission of the Church?', 'Ni nini kusudi kuu la Kanisa?', 27),
(60001, 'What are the two main sacraments/ordinances of the Church?', 'Ni nini sherehe mbili kuu za Kanisa?', 28),
(60001, 'What does baptism symbolize?', 'Nini kinachosimboliza ubatizo?', 29),
(60001, 'How should the Church treat people from different cultures and backgrounds?', 'Jinsi gani Kanisa linapaswa kukamatia watu kutoka utamaduni na asili tofauti?', 30),
(60001, 'Is heaven real according to the Bible?', 'Je, mbingu ni halisi kulingana na Biblia?', 31),
(60001, 'What is hell?', 'Ni nini jehanamu?', 32),
(60001, 'What does Jesus'' teaching about hell reveal about God?', 'Nini funzo la Yesu kuhusu jehanamu linafichua kuhusu Mungu?', 33),
(60001, 'When will Jesus return?', 'Lini Yesu atarudi?', 34),
(60001, 'What should be our response to the reality of heaven and hell?', 'Ni nini jibu letu kwa ukweli wa mbingu na jehanamu?', 35),
(60001, 'What is the Christian hope regarding eternity?', 'Ni nini tumaini la Kikristo kuhusu milele?', 36);
command:
